RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - OVERRULED. SEE LOCKHEED CORP. V. CONTINENTAL INSURANCE. Defendant to file an answer no later than 1/5/07. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/PB) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
